violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the 2 door slider have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the ware washing area. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025
The ceiling in the ware washing area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025

The floor and wall junctures in the ware washing area and front service line area do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Once certificate is obtained, PIC to register RI CFSM license. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2023
The coving by handsink and steamtable are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2023
